name: flow
description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code. Ships /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike + /flow:staff-review (four-lens parallel) + /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review + /flow:workflow-help, alongside the skeptical-reviewer surface (/flow:audit-plan, /flow:audit-completion, /flow:critique-plan, /flow:log-disagreement). Plus planner + docs context-isolation agents, four portable rules (general / plan-discipline / documentation / exploration), memory-corpus tool, flow.config.json JSON Schema (14 slots), and default hooks. v1.2.0 adds consumer-side scaffolding: template/base/ + template/stacks/{web,swift,tauri-rust-ts}/ + docs/bootstrap.md + docs/migration.md + security regression fixtures for the cwd-constraint and malicious-config defenses. Canonical 11-step loop documented at plugins/flow/docs/workflow.md; project-specific values come from flow.config.json (schema at plugins/flow/schema/flow.config.schema.json).
